description: Excess Siphon Life healing converts to a persistent shield on the Siphoner, then on a nearby ally.
tooltipTemplate: {shieldConversionPercent%} of excess Siphon Life healing converts to shielding. Fills the Siphoner's pool (cap {maxSelfShield:0}), then overflows to a nearby ally within {allyRadius:0} (cap {maxAllyShield:0} per ally). Shields persist until depleted.
